CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, datetime_value DateTime);
SELECT id, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(datetime_value) AS converted_datetime FROM test_dates WHERE converted_datetime > now() - interval 1 day;
SELECT id, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20240930000000) AS future_datetime FROM test_dates WHERE future_datetime IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE datetime_value = YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20231231010101);
WITH (SELECT YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20240101000000)) AS new_year_time SELECT new_year_time;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20221015203030) AS datetime_col;

SELECT id, datetime_value, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(datetime_value) FROM (SELECT id, YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(yyyymmddhhmmss) AS datetime_value FROM (SELECT 20230831153000 AS yyyymmddhhmmss UNION ALL SELECT 20231130235959)) AS derived_table;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20200505050505) AS value UNION ALL SELECT YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20230228235959) UNION ALL SELECT YYYYMMDDhhmmssToDateTime(20231231235959)) AS date_union_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
